name: Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 2 cups of boiled and mashed carrots
3 long zucchini, cut into strips and steamed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the onion and garlic in a little water.
2. Add the crushed tomatoes and basil. Let simmer on low for an hour.
3. Add salt and parsley to taste.
1. Boil the lasagna noodles and lay them out on a tablecloth to remain flat and dry.
2. In a large bowl, mix ricotta cheese with egg whites, white pepper, black pepper, sun-dried tomatoes (or flakes), and crushed garlic or garlic powder.
3. Place 1/3 of this mixture in a separate bowl with the spinach and another 1/3 with the carrots (add extra pepper to carrots).
4. Ladle marinara sauce on the bottom of a large lasagna pan, then add noodles to cover the bottom.
5. Layer steamed zucchini on top of the noodles, seasoning as desired with garlic and pepper.
6. Add another layer of noodles, then the carrot and cheese mixture.
7. Add another layer of noodles, followed by the spinach and ricotta mixture.
8. Add another layer of marinara sauce and sprinkle the remaining cheese on top.
9. Top with a final layer of noodles, marinara sauce, and chopped mushrooms, as well as any leftover sun-dried tomatoes or parsley.
10. Bake at 350°F for about 45 minutes.
Enjoy. My family was amazed that this was "healthy"!
